goal: Implement a minimal runnable /api/v2 backend skeleton (identity + story save + progress) with compatibility-first behavior and smoke tests.
constraints: Do not break existing /api/v1 routes or current gameplay runtime.
Reuse existing validation and storage logic where possible.
deliverables: Mounted /api/v2 router with identity, story, and progress endpoints.
Compatibility-aware request/response shape for v2 routes.
Automated smoke tests for v2 base functionality.
